user.title: Vega Library
user.description: Enter your library's Vega portal URL and your card credentials. The portal URL looks like https://yourlibrary.na4.iiivega.com/portal — find it by visiting your library's online catalog.

error.invalid_portal_url: Not a valid Vega portal URL. Check that you copied the correct URL from your library's online catalog.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid library card number or PIN.
error.api_error: The library portal returned an unexpected error. Check the logs.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This library card is already configured.
